science.title: The Sulfur Problem
science.description: Mercury’s magmas may not play by Earth’s rules. Laboratory work suggests that the innermost planet’s sulfur-rich, iron-poor chemistry could fundamentally alter how molten rock crystallizes, meaning planetary scientists cannot safely borrow terrestrial assumptions when reconstructing how Mercury’s mantle solidified. Research using the Indarch meteorite, an enstatite chondrite, as a stand-in for Mercury’s building blocks has […]

science.title: Hundreds of millions at risk as river deltas sink faster than rising seas
science.description: Many of the world’s largest river deltas—home to hundreds of millions of people—are sinking faster than rising seas, according to a sweeping global study. Using high-resolution satellite radar maps, researchers found that human activities like groundwater pumping, reduced sediment flow, and rapid urban growth are driving widespread land subsidence across 40 major deltas.

ai.title: Mastek cuts FY27 margin outlook, stock falls 4%
ai.description: Mastek shares fell over 4% after the company cut its 2026-27 (FY27) margin outlook to 16–16.5% from earlier expectations of around 17%. CEO Umang Nahata cited competitive pricing pressure and AI-led disruption, with 10–15% discounts in deal renewals. While the January-March quarter of 2026 (Q4FY26) saw modest revenue growth, profitability remained under pressure, though the company expects FY27 to be a stronger year with a recovery in North America.

ai.title: Worried about AI taking your job? Sridhar Vembu shares how to succeed in the AI era
ai.description: As AI reshapes the tech industry, Sridhar Vembu argues that coding alone will not guarantee job security. The Zoho cofounder urges engineers to develop deep domain expertise and focus on real-world problem solving. His views add to a growing debate on how AI will redefine productivity, roles and long-term career value.

ai.title: Will AI take your job? Take-Two CEO says no, else Elon Musk would be jobless right now
ai.description: Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick has claimed that AI won’t take your jobs. He reckoned that if that was the case then Elon Musk, one of the biggest proponents of AI, may be the first to be replaced. Zelnick even joked that perhaps Musk might be a simulation. Take-Two Interactive is the publisher of the GTA franchise.
